evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A classification dispute uses the higher class until the Data Lifecycle Owner resolves it; feature-local taxonomies are not permitted.
scope: downstream security privacy and observability standards
statement: Every product-data element MUST be classified before storage or processing as public, internal, confidential, or restricted using the canonical taxonomy in the Data Lifecycle chapter; downstream standards MUST NOT define a competing taxonomy.
